---
title: "DTT Scratch Area"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Basic Charts

![](Heather Scratch Space/plotFY.png){width="438"}

![](Heather Scratch Space/plotAG.png){width="366"}

::: panel-tabset
##### All modes

```{r}
#| label: fig-type1-arrival
#| fig-cap: Arrival mode to Type 1 A&E. All of England, 2023/24.
tar_read(ae_trans_barplot)
```

##### Trend

```{r}
#| label: fig-type1-arrival-trend
#| fig-cap: Arrival mode to Type 1 A&E. All of England, 2019/20 to 2023/24.
tar_read(ae_trans_trends)
```

##### Table

```{r}
#| label: tbl-type1-arrival-trend
#| tbl-cap: Arrival mode to Type 1 A&E. All of England, 2019/20 to 2023/24.
tar_read(ae_transp_trends) |>
  create_dt()
```
:::

##### Table

```{r}
#| label: tbl-type1-arrival-trend
#| tbl-cap: Arrival mode to Type 1 A&E. All of England, 2019/20 to 2023/24.
gt_causes <- tar_read(ae_diag) |> 
  filter(der_financial_year == '2023/24', ec_department_type == 1) |> 
  summarise(attends = sum(attends), .by = term) |>
  rename(SNOMED_term = term) |> 
  arrange(desc(attends)) |> 
  slice_head(n = 10) 

create_dt(gt_causes) 
```

##### Table

```{r}
#| label: Distance by FY
#| tbl-cap: Distance by FY.
    data |>
    dplyr::summarise(Average_Distance = mean(average_distance_per_admission),
                     .by = FIN_YEAR) |>
      mutate(Average_Distance = janitor::round_half_up(Average_Distance, 4)) |>
      create_dt()
```
